0.3.0.en: New: printable health report (up to 90 days — stats, charts and daily values; dark on screen, light when printed to PDF; served briefly on your LAN with a one-time password). New: 'Asleep' sensor with automatic wake detection, 'Mark as asleep/awake' flow actions and an asleep condition. Fixed: SpO2 now uses Google's daily summary instead of raw spot readings (no more 50% outliers). Health report: add patient details (name, date of birth, gender, height) with age and a BMI tile incl. WHO category — height is taken from Google Health automatically, gender is optional and informational only.

0.2.0.en: Health report: add patient details (name, date of birth, gender, height) with age and a BMI tile incl. WHO category — height is taken from Google Health automatically, gender is optional and informational only.

0.1.7.en: SpO2 now uses the daily summary (like the Google Health app) instead of raw spot readings, which could show low-confidence values like 50%.
0.1.7.de: SpO2 nutzt jetzt die Tageszusammenfassung (wie die Google-Health-App) statt roher Einzelmessungen, die Ausreißer wie 50% anzeigen konnten.
0.1.7.nl: SpO2 gebruikt nu de dagelijkse samenvatting (zoals de Google Health-app) in plaats van ruwe losse metingen, die uitschieters zoals 50% konden tonen.

0.1.4.en: Added Dutch translation (app, flow cards and store description).
0.1.4.de: Niederländische Übersetzung ergänzt (App, Flow-Karten und Store-Beschreibung).
0.1.4.nl: Nederlandse vertaling toegevoegd (app, Flow-kaarten en storebeschrijving).

0.1.3.en: Fixed the app icon (now renders correctly in the App Store).
0.1.3.de: App-Icon korrigiert (wird jetzt im App Store richtig angezeigt).
0.1.3.nl: App-pictogram gerepareerd (wordt nu correct weergegeven in de App Store).

0.1.1.en: Linked the community forum topic and switched to Homey Pro only.
0.1.1.de: Community-Forum-Topic verknüpft und auf Homey Pro beschränkt.
0.1.1.nl: Community-forumtopic gekoppeld en beperkt tot Homey Pro.

0.1.0.en: Initial test release: 16 health sensors with Insights, OAuth login with your own Google Cloud project, and flow cards for steps, sleep, workouts, heart rate and more.
0.1.0.de: Erste Testversion: 16 Gesundheits-Sensoren mit Insights, OAuth-Login mit eigenem Google-Cloud-Projekt und Flow-Karten für Schritte, Schlaf, Training, Herzfrequenz und mehr.
0.1.0.nl: Eerste testversie: 16 gezondheidssensoren met Insights, OAuth-login met je eigen Google Cloud-project en Flow-kaarten voor stappen, slaap, training, hartslag en meer.

0.4.0.en: New health data: nutrition (calorie intake, carbs, protein, fat), blood glucose, basal calories, sedentary minutes, respiratory rate, VO2 max, altitude and skin-temperature variation — all in Insights. Optional ECG and irregular heart rhythm (extra Google permission). Fixed: water, nutrition macros and sedentary minutes now read correctly; more accurate blood-glucose parsing.
